targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) AS value FROM analytics.churn_predictions WHERE predicted_at = (SELECT max(predicted_at) FROM analytics.churn_predictions);
SELECT count(*) AS value FROM analytics.churn_predictions WHERE churn_risk_tier = 'critical' AND predicted_at = (SELECT max(predicted_at) FROM analytics.churn_predictions);
SELECT sum(mrr) AS value FROM marts.fct_mrr_monthly WHERE month_start = (SELECT max(month_start) FROM marts.fct_mrr_monthly);

WITH m AS (SELECT month_start, count(distinct account_id) FILTER (WHERE movement_type='churn') AS churned, count(distinct account_id) FILTER (WHERE movement_type IN ('new','expansion','steady','contraction')) AS active FROM marts.fct_mrr_movements GROUP BY 1) SELECT (churned::float / nullif(lag(active) OVER (ORDER BY month_start),0)) AS value FROM m ORDER BY month_start DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT month_start AS time, sum(mrr) AS "MRR" FROM marts.fct_mrr_monthly WHERE month_start >= now() - interval '12 months' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT month_start AS time, sum(delta_mrr) FILTER (WHERE movement_type='new') AS "new", sum(delta_mrr) FILTER (WHERE movement_type='expansion') AS "expansion", sum(delta_mrr) FILTER (WHERE movement_type='contraction') AS "contraction", sum(delta_mrr) FILTER (WHERE movement_type='churn') AS "churn" FROM marts.fct_mrr_movements WHERE month_start >= now() - interval '6 months' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT CASE WHEN is_churned THEN 'dormant' WHEN rule_based_health_score >= 70 THEN 'champion' WHEN rule_based_health_score >= 50 THEN 'healthy' WHEN rule_based_health_score >= 30 THEN 'at_risk' ELSE 'dormant' END AS tier, count(*) AS accounts FROM marts.mart_account_health GROUP BY 1;
